reusable_phrase_evidence: I feel like this overcomplicates the pyproject.toml
I would love to get some feedback from any of these frontend developers if this is something they can see being standardized.

result.explanation: The path meets all validity criteria: it is mechanically valid, contains exactly 3 posts (within the 2-6 limit), and forms a coherent conversational sequence about standardizing build targets. It supplies multiple source-verified, reusable conversational phrases focused on proposing ideas, expressing concern/uncertainty, and requesting feedback. The technical context is present but does not overwhelm the conversational learning value, making it fully suitable for a lightweight English phrase-learning quiz.
